title: ICON7 high-risk subgroup overall survival
summary: Cached demo based on ICON7 Figure 2C, showing overall survival in the predefined high-risk subgroup of newly diagnosed ovarian cancer patients.
source_note: Oza et al., Standard chemotherapy with or without bevacizumab for women with newly diagnosed ovarian cancer (ICON7): overall survival results of a phase 3 randomised trial, Figure 2C.
